summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HUD Ring Animation interface with 3 concentric rings. Most core functionality working correctly with some minor side panel content mapping issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button occasionally positioned outside viewport causing click failures

integration_issues.issue: Some segments (memory, customization, explore-mode) not opening side panels consistently
Some segments (projects, archive) not opening side panels consistently, incorrect panel content mapping for some segments
Ring 1 overlay intercepting pointer events for Ring 2 segments, requiring force clicks

passed_tests: HUD renders with all 3 rings visible
Ring 1 AI segment clicking switches active AI (Ajani->Minerva->Hermes->Council)
Ring 1 rotation animation when AI is selected
Core planet visualization changes color based on active AI
AI status display shows active AI name correctly
Speaking state indicator appears briefly after AI selection
Voice toggle button is visible and clickable
Ring 2 Operations segments (manual, encyclopedia, system-monitor) open side panels
Ring 3 Knowledge segments (subjects, lab, systems) open side panels
Side panel close button works (when positioned correctly)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix side panel content mapping for Ring 2 (memory, customization, explore-mode) and Ring 3 (projects, archive) segments. Resolve overlay issue where Ring 1 intercepts Ring 2 clicks. Fix side panel close button positioning to stay within viewport.
success_percentage: frontend: 75% - Core functionality working, minor panel mapping and overlay issues
